text:
Chattanoogans will soon get a chance to celebrate hometown gold medalist weightlifter Olivia Reeves.

City officials Friday announced a parade for Reeves on Sept. 3 on the University of Tennessee at Chattanooga's campus.

title: Chattanooga to throw parade for Olympic champ Olivia Reeves | Chattanooga Times Free Press
description: Chattanoogans will soon get a chance to celebrate hometown gold medalist weightlifter Olivia Reeves.
